Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-9539 affecting package libslirp for versions less than 4.9.3-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-9539 affecting package libslirp for versions less than 4.9.3-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package libslirp is earlier than 4.9.3-1, affected by CVE-2026-9539
